summary: REQ-11 appears implemented: the navbar AuthButton unauthenticated label explicitly says "Sign In (Internet Identity)", and the RequireAuth sign-in card describes signing in with Internet Identity without mentioning Google login. REQ-12 cannot be verified from the provided HelpPage.tsx diff excerpt because the FAQ section is truncated before any new Google-login FAQ item is shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a short FAQ entry to the Help page explaining that Google login is not supported and that users should use Internet Identity instead.
missing_requirements.reason: The Help page diff is truncated in the FAQ section; the visible portion shows existing FAQ items but does not show a new accordion item about Google login not being supported / using Internet Identity. With the provided evidence, implementation cannot be confirmed.
